meta.name: VisLoc-20 Ground Truth Data
meta.description: Programmatic Evaluation Protocol for the VisLoc-20 Benchmark
meta.methodology: Dual-Gate Evaluation: Gate 1 (Deterministic UI Physics) must be strictly passed before Semantic Meaning (Gate 2) is evaluated.

pass_criteria.gate_1_physics: Target translation must not exceed 21 CPS and must force a clean max 2-line visual layout.
pass_criteria.gate_2_semantics: LLM must execute transcreation: aggressively delete literal adjectives ('absolutely', 'stubborn', 'officially') to preserve the active verbs 'crush' and 'obliterate'.

videos.standard_app_failure_mode: Translates literally, expanding character count by 30%. Results in an unreadable 4-line text wall covering the speaker's face, or a strobe-light flash of 10 cards at 35+ CPS.

pass_criteria.gate_1_physics: The 3-second pause must result in a completely blank screen.
pass_criteria.gate_2_semantics: Segmenter must mathematically shift the preposition backward to complete the thought before the pause occurs. No dangling articles.

videos.standard_app_failure_mode: Leaves a dangling article (e.g., 'the' or 'am') stranded on screen alone for 3 full seconds of silence.

pass_criteria.gate_1_physics: Line breaks must strictly obey Japanese Kinsoku Shori rules (no slicing of Kanji compounds or severing grammatical particles from nouns).
pass_criteria.gate_2_semantics: Maintain dense B2B/tech formality without outputting conversational particles.

videos.standard_app_failure_mode: Uses greedy pixel-filling to hit the visual edge, blindly chopping spaceless Japanese text directly through the middle of a syllable.

pass_criteria.gate_1_physics: Line breaks must not occur inside an acronym (e.g., 'CI/ \n CD').
pass_criteria.gate_2_semantics: Must globally protect proper nouns. 'ROI' and 'CI/CD pipeline' must remain untranslated and structurally intact.

videos.standard_app_failure_mode: Hallucinates literal translations of acronyms (e.g., 'Return on Investment' becomes 'Kapitalrendite'), inflating character length and breaking the visual bounding box.

pass_criteria.gate_1_physics: Must maintain conversational visual pacing matching the speaker's vocal fry (< 18 CPS).
pass_criteria.gate_2_semantics: Must bypass literal dictionary translation entirely and map 'main character energy' and 'no cap' to native target-language Gen-Z slang.

videos.standard_app_failure_mode: Outputs literal grammatical gibberish ('Giving main character energy, no cap' -> 'Gibt Hauptcharakter Energie, keine Kappe').

pass_criteria.gate_1_physics: Must anchor the legal text block cleanly at the bottom, dynamically shrinking text size if necessary to fit the final 5 seconds.
pass_criteria.gate_2_semantics: LLM must dynamically switch to OFF for transcreation. Must enforce 100% literal dictionary translation to maintain legal compliance.

videos.standard_app_failure_mode: Attempts to 'transcreate' the legal warning to save visual space, illegally dropping critical disclaimers like 'loss of principal'.

pass_criteria.gate_1_physics: Text bounding box must artificially constrict to avoid the bottom-right 9:16 TikTok UI interaction zone.
pass_criteria.gate_2_semantics: Preserve the aggressive CTA 'click the link'.

videos.standard_app_failure_mode: Renders text in the bottom right corner exactly where the creator is pointing, rendering the text completely unreadable beneath the TikTok 'Share' buttons.

pass_criteria.gate_1_physics: Text must lock dead-center (Y-axis 50%) to avoid the bottom 15% progress bar.
pass_criteria.gate_2_semantics: Preserve authoritative professional list-hook intonation.

videos.standard_app_failure_mode: Subtitles render at the default bottom 15%, bleeding directly into LinkedIn's native video progress timeline.

pass_criteria.gate_1_physics: Text renders Bottom-Center for 3.9 seconds, then dynamically jumps to Top-Center precisely at 0:04 to avoid the hardcoded news graphic.
pass_criteria.gate_2_semantics: Standard broadcast formal translation pacing.

videos.standard_app_failure_mode: Blindly prints subtitles over the hardcoded breaking news lower-third graphic, causing catastrophic visual collision.

pass_criteria.gate_1_physics: Must execute a hard visual cut exactly at 0:05.
pass_criteria.gate_2_semantics: Strict speaker diarization. Subtitle cards for Person A and Person B must never merge into a single text block.

videos.standard_app_failure_mode: The ASR panics during the cross-talk interruption and merges both voices into one schizophrenic subtitle card.

pass_criteria.gate_1_physics: Visual timestamps must tighten purely to semantic words, avoiding holding text on screen during 'um' gaps.
pass_criteria.gate_2_semantics: LLM must explicitly sanitize audio filler and false starts from the final printed output into a clean thought.

videos.standard_app_failure_mode: Blindly typesets the garbage audio literally: 'Um, I wanted... you should... um, this phone'.

pass_criteria.gate_1_physics: Pacing remains perfectly stable despite acoustic background chaos.
pass_criteria.gate_2_semantics: Cleanly extracts the screaming vocal track and translates the core excitement without hallucinating.

videos.standard_app_failure_mode: ASR hallucinates ghost words ('and', 'the') out of the wind and traffic noise, printing non-existent dialogue.

pass_criteria.gate_1_physics: Must keep the psychological hook entirely on a single screen.
pass_criteria.gate_2_semantics: Radical transcreation: Must drop the literal noun 'fuel source' (Energiequelle) to preserve the causative agency 'Allow/Let' ('Lass deinen Körper Fett verbrennen').

videos.standard_app_failure_mode: Drops the active hook entirely to save space, outputting a passive biological fact ('Dein Körper nutzt Fett'), or splits across two screens ruining the hook.

pass_criteria.gate_1_physics: Must mathematically wrap the line without slicing a compound word.
pass_criteria.gate_2_semantics: Must prompt the LLM to use standardized B2B abbreviations (e.g., 'Cloud-ERP-Systeme') to protect bounding box physics against massive literal compounds.

videos.standard_app_failure_mode: Translates to a 35-letter monolithic German word and blindly chops it at the visual boundary ('Unternehmensressourcen- / planung').

pass_criteria.gate_1_physics: Maintains balanced layout constraints under 21 CPS.
pass_criteria.gate_2_semantics: Must completely abandon the literal translation and map the English idiom ('bite the bullet') to the exact native emotional equivalent ('in den sauren Apfel beißen').

videos.standard_app_failure_mode: Translates the idiom literally (e.g., 'Die Kugel beißen'), resulting in a confusing, nonsensical subtitle that ruins the video.

pass_criteria.gate_1_physics: Layout Engine must expand the target English output into distinct, mathematically balanced cards that hold slightly past the Chinese audio envelope to ensure reading comfort.
pass_criteria.gate_2_semantics: Unpacks dense Mandarin characters into fully formed English descriptive adjectives.

videos.standard_app_failure_mode: Chinese is phonetically fast. The English translation forces 10+ words to flash on screen in a 2-second strobe light.

pass_criteria.gate_1_physics: Layout engine dynamically anchors the shorter English text across the full kinetic energy of the Spanish audio waveform so it feels visually synchronous.
pass_criteria.gate_2_semantics: Translates the passionate UGC tone without losing intent.

videos.standard_app_failure_mode: Flashes the shorter English text for 3 seconds, leaving the screen awkwardly blank for 5 seconds while the Spanish speaker is still gesturing wildly.

pass_criteria.gate_1_physics: Binds the 3 English words as a single semantic entity and stretches it perfectly across the exact start-to-finish waveform of the massive German audio word.
pass_criteria.gate_2_semantics: Accurately parses the specific B2B software compliance term ('GDPR compliance').

videos.standard_app_failure_mode: Timestamps the entire English phrase to the final 0.5-second syllable of the German word, completely out of sync with the speaker's mouth.

pass_criteria.gate_1_physics: Completely strips RTL metadata in Pass-1. Mathematically renders perfect Left-To-Right English syntax, placing periods cleanly on the right side.
pass_criteria.gate_2_semantics: Maintains luxury architectural tone.

videos.standard_app_failure_mode: Corrupts the LTR target UI, inheriting Arabic metadata to output flipped text logic and punctuation on the wrong side: '.today exactly lifestyle luxury your fits'

pass_criteria.gate_1_physics: Matches casual vlog pacing.
pass_criteria.gate_2_semantics: Pass-1 Linguist flattens global visual/semantic context. Recognizes the speaker is a vlogger talking about herself and correctly injects the unstated pronoun ('I' or 'We') required by English grammar.

videos.standard_app_failure_mode: Because Korean drops pronouns, an AI without global context panics and randomly hallucinates the wrong pronoun ('He applies it every morning').
